stories.title: Follow live: Argentina, Spain searching for opener...
Fox birdies difficult 18th to pass Young, win Open...
stories.summary: Ryan Fox birdied four of the final six holes at Royal Birkdale, including the difficult 18th hole, to win the Open Championship by one stroke over Cameron Young.

stories.title: Sources: Hawks acquire Dort in three-team trade
stories.summary: The Thunder are trading All-Defensive wing Luguentz Dort to the Hawks in a three-team deal that sends three second-round picks to Oklahoma City, former No. 1 pick Zaccharie Risacher to the Mavericks and Ryan Nembhard to Atlanta, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: RB Skattebo 'perfectly fine' after botched backfli...
stories.summary: Giants running back Cam Skattebo says he is "perfectly fine" after falling awkwardly on his surgically repaired ankle following a botched backflip attempt.

stories.title: Scheffler: DeChambeau 'definitely not a cheater'
stories.summary: Scottie Scheffler defended Bryson DeChambeau, saying the LIV Golf star is "definitely not a cheater."
